taglines: Bear markets can't catch Lil Blunt's vibe.
HODL tight, the Smoke Realm rewards the patient.
Diamond hands? Lil Blunt has diamond lungs.
Dodge the rug pulls, chase the moon.
Gas fees got nothing on these high scores.
Paper hands need not enter the Smoke Realm.
Rolling through dips like they never happened.
Bull or bear, Lil Blunt just keeps blazing.
Minted fresh, never rugged, always lifted.
Stake your claim in the chillest chain around.
